question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not mention or list any chapters of the thesis. It only describes the problem statement and the proposed solution.

question: Description
feedback: The text does not describe the contents of any thesis sections; it focuses entirely on the problem context and the objective of the research.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis is not visible. The text is repetitive (the first paragraph and second paragraph repeat almost the same information) and fails to outline the logical flow of the work.
